data.title: LightStim and Hand & Stone Announce National Launch of FDA-Cleared Elipsa
data.description: After a successful pilot program, an expanded partnership has been established to provide clinically proven LED therapy to spa guests across the country. LightStim, known for its professional-grade LED light therapy products, has joined forces with Hand & Stone Massage and Facial Spa. The collaboration was announced on April 3, 2026, in Irvine, California. This partnership aims to bring the benefits of LED therapy to more individuals nationwide.

data.title: Frisco TMJ and Airway Dentist Dr. Dunia Korous Launches New Millennium Smiles Website Focused on Sleep Apnea and Advanced Dental Care
data.description: Highly experienced dentist Dr. Dunia Korous, known for her expertise in TMJ therapy and airway-focused dentistry, has introduced a new website for Millennium Smiles based in Frisco, Texas. The updated website features the practice's cutting-edge treatment options, such as the FDA-cleared devices.

data.title: Parents Face 6-12 Month Delays for Autism Care--New Platform by Kid Care Connect Aims to Fix Broken System
data.description: In various regions of the United States, parents are currently experiencing significant challenges obtaining timely autism evaluations and developmental care for their children. Reports indicate that wait times for these services can range from six to twelve months, with some parents having to contact as many as 8 to 12 providers before securing a single available appointment. Unfortunately, these delays in accessing essential care can impede children's timely access to crucial support and interventions.

data.title: Antier Delivers #1 AI-Driven and MiCA-Ready White Label Neo Bank Platform for the European Market
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in New Delhi, Antier, a prominent firm specializing in blockchain and AI technologies, introduced MiCA-Ready white-label crypto neo-banking platforms aimed at equipping European financial institutions with advanced AI-driven Web3 features. This initiative aims to provide cutting-edge technological solutions to financial institutions in Europe for enhancing their services. Antier's enterprise-grade platform offers state-of-the-art capabilities to facilitate this digital transformation in the banking sector.

data.title: NeuroSense Therapeutics Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notifications Regarding Minimum Bid Price and Market Value Requirements
data.description: The recent notifications received by the Company regarding Nasdaq compliance have not resulted in any immediate impact on the listing or trading of the Company's securities. Nasdaq has given the Company a deadline of September 29, 2026, to meet the necessary requirements for compliance. The Company is currently engaged in assessing strategic measures to ensure compliance within the stipulated timeframe, emphasizing a proactive approach towards this goal.

data.title: Managed Detection and Response (MDR) Market worth $19.01 billion by 2031 | MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that the Managed Detection and Response (MDR) Market is expected to experience significant growth. The market is projected to increase from USD 6.28 billion in 2026 to USD 19.01 billion by 2031, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.8% throughout the forecast period. This information comes from a report by MarketsandMarkets™, which also includes data from 500 market tables for reference.

data.title: Highflame and Tailscale Partner to Secure AI Agents and Model & MCP Interactions at the Network Layer
data.description: In San Francisco, AI agents are currently generating numerous LLM requests on developer machines, CI pipelines, and internal systems. These requests include prompts, tool calls, secrets, and sensitive data, leading to a significant yet overlooked security risk for enterprises. Highflame, an AI Security firm specializing in safeguarding AI agents and their operations, has partnered with Tailscale. This collaboration aims to provide instantaneous security assessments for AI activity within the network layer.

data.title: Better Life Science Spotlights Tick Season Prevention, At-Home Lyme Testing
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 3, 2026, Better Life Science is shedding light on the rising tick activity during the warmer months. The company is emphasizing the importance of prevention, early detection, and providing access to at-home Lyme disease testing under their Tick Bite Hero brand. As the spring season sees an increase in individuals engaging in outdoor activities, this initiative aims to address the growing concern over tick-related health hazards.

data.title: Stolt-Nielsen Limited to Host a Video Conference to Present the Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) announced a virtual presentation to review its unaudited results for Q1 of 2026. The presentation is scheduled for Thursday, April 9, 2026, at 15:00 CEST (09:00 EDT, 14:00 BST). Stakeholders and investors can join the discussion to gain insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: NeOnc Provides Business Update and Reports Q4 2025 Financial Results
data.description: NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed their financial results for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. As a multi-Phase 2 clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in innovative treatments for central nervous system (CNS) cancers, NeOnc is listed on Nasdaq as NTHI. The update also included significant operational accomplishments and forthcoming milestones.

data.title: Ethereum L2s must adapt pricing for scalability, states Offchain Labs head. Arbitrum's model tests alternative to EIP-1559 fee swings.
data.description: Edward Felten emphasized the importance of responsive pricing for Ethereum Layer 2 solutions in order to achieve scalability. This comes as Arbitrum introduces a new model that explores an alternative approach to the fee fluctuations seen in EIP-1559. Felten's insights suggest a shift towards dynamic pricing mechanisms within Layer 2 networks to address scalability challenges and potentially stabilize transaction costs in the Ethereum ecosystem. This discussion comes at a crucial time as Ethereum continues to face congestion issues, with over 2.0 million transactions processed daily on the network. Felten's remarks highlight the need for innovative solutions to enhance the efficiency and sustainability of Ethereum's infrastructure amidst increasing demand and competition.
